Referral code:

When someone uses your referral code to make a purchase of $25 or more, they get 50% extra coins on top of their purchase!

The total amount purchased with your code adds up and places you on the leaderboard. The top 20 referrers at the end of the month will receive 10% of the total amount purchased using your code in $MBAG coins, calculated on the launch price of $0.003!

The more that's purchased using your referral code, the more $MBAG you earn! Stay tuned for monthly winner announcements on our socials.

Got a thriving crypto community? Let's talk! Get cash back for every purchase your community makes. Reach out if you have at least 5,000 members. Let's grow together!

Rocket RichesRocket RichesRocket Riches

Our presale strategy is a stellar blueprint for success, ensuring a smooth launch and an orbit of prosperity. Discover how we're securing liquidity, powering community incentives, and navigating the galaxy of crypto with finesse.

🌕 Liquidity Boost (20% of Raised Funds) 🚀

Daily Dose: We'll feed our liquidity wallet daily with 20% of the presale funds, ensuring a steady supply of liquidity tokens and a rock-solid foundation for trading.
Lock and Load: This liquidity will be locked for two years post-launch, like securing a safe vault in space, safeguarding our trading stability and boosting investor confidence.

🚀 MoonBag Marketing Blitz (75% of Raised Funds) 🌌

Influencer Launch: Partnering with top-notch influencers for YouTube reviews and shoutouts to spread the MoonBag love across the galaxy.
Media Stardom: Making waves in online publications, showcasing MoonBag's stellar features and why it's the next big thing in crypto.
Community Thrills: Hosting engaging events, contests, and giveaways to grow our MoonBag family and keep the hype engines roaring.
Knowledge Hub: Educating our community with informative content about MoonBag's tech, roadmap, and cosmic potential.

🌌 Operational Warp Drive (5% of Raised Funds) 🛸

Development Galaxy: Investing in top-tier development to keep MoonBag's tech sleek, secure, and ahead of the crypto curve.
Social Universe: Keeping our social media game strong, interacting with our community, and spreading MoonBag memes and vibes across the cosmos.
Space Oddities: Covering all the little things that keep MoonBag running smoothly, from legal compliance to platform upgrades and beyond.
This strategic roadmap ensures that every dollar from the presale fuels MoonBag's journey to astronomical success. Get ready to blast off with us and ride the MoonBag rocket to the stars! 🚀🌕
